fix_applied.action: Replaced fixed thresholds with percentile-based thresholds

limitation_encountered.root_cause: Stability is hardcoded to 0.5 in MetaStrategyV2._calc_state_features (line 133) which is frozen
limitation_encountered.explanation: Every period receives exactly 1 TRANSITION vote from stability (stability < 0.6), plus regime_shift is always False. This creates a floor of ~460 TRANSITION votes that cannot be reduced by entropy/volatility threshold adjustment alone.
limitation_encountered.attempted_fix: Adjusted entropy and volatility thresholds to percentile-based
limitation_encountered.why_insufficient: Stability voting is fixed-threshold (not percentile-based), and its value is hardcoded in frozen MetaStrategyV2. Threshold adjustment for entropy/volatility cannot offset guaranteed TRANSITION votes from stability.
limitation_encountered.scope_of_fix: Entropy/volatility thresholds adjusted but stability mechanism untouched (frozen)

comparison.improvement: COLD and CHAOTIC now present; HOT dominance eliminated

state_detector_recalibration_report.gate_result: FAIL - TRANSITION dominates due to frozen stability mechanism
state_detector_recalibration_report.recommendation: To fully restore state space balance, would need to either: (1) unfreeze MetaStrategyV2 to fix stability calculation, or (2) accept TRANSITION dominance as data/system characteristic
